title: rubus dethardingii
intro: Rubus dethardingii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus dethardingii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
